subject: Gaming
title: FOMO: Fear of Missing Out
description: Learn FOMO: Fear of Missing Out in one minute.

hook.text: Log in today or miss this exclusive item forever. FOMO is gaming's most powerful manipulation tool.

buildup.text: Limited-time events create urgency. Battle passes expire. Seasonal skins vanish after the deadline.

discovery.text: FOMO triggers loss aversion—the pain of missing out feels twice as strong as the joy of gaining.

twist.text: Players log in daily out of obligation, not enjoyment. The game becomes a chore to avoid missing rewards.

climax.text: FOMO converts games from entertainment into daily obligations—fundamentally changing the relationship.

punchline.text: Play today or lose it forever. Fun became an obligation.

quiz.question: How does FOMO affect gaming behavior?
options: Players log in out of obligation to avoid missing limited-time rewards
It has no effect on play habits
